resources.string: Nova Score is a classification system that categorizes food products into four groups based on the extent and purpose of industrial processing, from unprocessed to ultra-processed (1-4). Unlike Nutri-Score, which focuses on nutrient content, it helps consumers identify how much a food has been altered by industrial additives and manufacturing techniques.

Nutri-Score is a front-of-pack labeling system that converts the nutritional value of products into a simple code consisting of 5 letters (A to E) and 5 colors (dark green to dark orange). It is designed to help consumers compare the nutritional quality of similar food items at a glance.

Eco-Score is a labeling system that rates the environmental impact of a food product throughout its entire life cycle, from farming and processing to transport and packaging. It uses a color-coded scale from A (low impact) to E (high impact) to help consumers choose products that are more sustainable for the planet.
We need these numbers to calculate your BMR. No lying, we\'ll know! \n Capisce? 🤌
